_comment: VS Code Continue extension — HYBRID profile. Inference happens on Ubuntu worker via SSH tunnel. Start the tunnel first: bash scripts/start_remote_ollama_tunnel.sh

tabAutocompleteModel.title: Qwen2.5 Coder 7B (remote via tunnel) — pull on Ubuntu first

_security_note: If you switch to direct LAN (http://REPLACE_ME_WORKER_LAN_IP:11434), Ollama must be bound to that IP and the firewall must restrict it to the Mac's IP. The SSH tunnel option is safer.
